title: Hiring Medical Officer at BLK-Max Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at BLK-Max Hospital
jsonLd.description:
BLK-Max Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BLK-Max Hospital:
BLK-Max Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital!
